confidence_notes: All skills extracted from concrete work experience at Stripe, Plaid, and LinkedIn internship. Skills section corroborated by specific project implementations and technologies mentioned in job descriptions. No aspirational skills included.

projects.name: Distributed Rate-Limiting System (Stripe)
projects.summary: Designed and implemented distributed rate-limiting system handling 120,000 RPS in production for Billing API microservices processing $4B+ in annual transactions.

projects.name: Bank Connection Ingestion Pipeline (Plaid)
projects.summary: Built production bank connection ingestion pipeline processing 2M+ daily connections using Celery and RabbitMQ message queue architecture.

projects.name: PostgreSQL Migration (Plaid)
projects.summary: Migrated 8 production services from PostgreSQL 11 to 14 with zero-downtime using logical replication, maintaining 99.99% uptime SLA.

projects.name: OAuth Token Encryption (Plaid)
projects.summary: Implemented end-to-end encryption for OAuth token storage using AES-256 in production environment.

projects.name: LinkedIn Learning Recommendation Engine (LinkedIn)
projects.summary: Built backend features for LinkedIn Learning recommendation engine with A/B testing instrumentation running experiments on 500,000 daily active users.

impact_highlights.description: Designed distributed rate-limiting system for Stripe Billing API handling massive transaction volume
Optimized Stripe Billing API latency through profiling and Go hot path rewrites
impact_highlights.metric: Reduced P99 latency from 380ms to 95ms (75% improvement)

impact_highlights.description: Built production bank connection ingestion pipeline at Plaid
Executed zero-downtime database migration across 8 production services
A/B testing instrumentation for LinkedIn Learning recommendation engine
impact_highlights.metric: Ran experiments on 500,000 daily active users

confidence_metrics.confidence_notes: All 12 skills directly corroborated by specific work experience at top-tier companies (Stripe, Plaid, LinkedIn). Each skill mentioned in job descriptions with concrete project implementations. No self-reported skills without supporting evidence.

Projects classified based on explicit technology mentions and deployment context. All projects are production systems with measurable impact metrics. Senior-level experience evident from scope (microservices, $4B transactions, mentorship).
Impact metrics extracted directly from job descriptions with concrete numbers (120k RPS, 2M daily, 75% latency reduction, 99.99% uptime). All metrics are quantifiable and deployment-verified.
